title: Direct 3D-Aware Object Insertion via Decomposed Visual Proxies
summary: Object insertion aims to seamlessly composite a reference object into a specified region of a background image. Recent diffusion-based methods achieve high visual quality but formulate insertion as a simple 2D inpainting task, providing no explicit control over the object's 3D pose and limiting their practical applicability. We propose DIRECT (Decomposed Injection for Reference Composition and Target-integration), a novel framework that integrates interactive pose manipulation with high-fidelity 2D image synthesis to enable pose-controllable object insertion. Our method decomposes the insertion conditions into three complementary components: appearance guidance capturing visual details from the reference object, geometry guidance derived from the user-adjusted 3D proxy, and context guidance from the target background. By injecting them through separate pathways, DIRECT avoids feature entanglement and simultaneously preserves reference appearance, follows the user-specified pose, and adapts the object to the target scene. We also introduce an automated data construction pipeline to improve the diversity and quality of training data. Experiments show that DIRECT outperforms previous methods in both geometric controllability and visual quality.

interest_filter.reason: 该论文提出DIRECT框架，实现3D感知的对象插入（Object Insertion），支持姿态可控的交互式操作，涉及3D几何引导、参考对象外观保持等。与用户的"3D Generation"、"Geometric"、"Interactive Video Generation"（交互式控制相关）等兴趣高度相关。

AI.tldr: 提出DIRECT框架，通过分解注入参考外观、3D几何和背景上下文三类条件，实现可控3D姿态的物体插入，在几何可控性和视觉质量上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散式物体插入方法仅将其视为2D修补任务，无法显式控制物体3D姿态，限制了实际应用。
AI.method: 将插入条件分解为外观引导、几何引导（来自用户调整的3D代理）和上下文引导，通过独立路径注入避免特征纠缠；同时引入自动化数据构建流程提升训练数据质量。
AI.result: 在几何可控性和视觉质量上均优于以往方法。
AI.conclusion: DIRECT框架实现了姿态可控、高保真的物体插入，解决了现有方法缺乏3D姿态控制的核心问题。

title: RigPAPR: Rig-Based Animation of Static Neural Point Clouds from a Fixed-Viewpoint Video
comment: An overview video is available at https://youtu.be/up3BwRHYWG8
summary: Static neural point reconstructions capture a subject at high fidelity from posed images. Given such a reconstruction, we aim to animate it to follow a monocular fixed-viewpoint driving video of the subject, whether captured or produced by image-to-video (I2V) generation, and to recover a rigged, re-posable 3D asset. Existing methods deform Gaussian splats through direct linear blend skinning (LBS) or mesh proxies, both of which are prone to joint-boundary artifacts under articulation, even with per-primitive corrections. We trace the artifact to the representation: each splat carries an individual shape calibrated in the canonical pose to tile with its neighbours. Under rigid LBS, each splat moves with its bone but cannot bend, so the canonical tiling breaks at joint boundaries into gaps and spikes. Proximity attention point rendering (PAPR) instead carries no per-primitive shape; each pixel is recomposed at render time from the deformed primitives' positions, so the surface re-forms naturally with the articulation. We present RigPAPR, which auto-rigs a static PAPR cloud and drives it under direct LBS from a single fixed-viewpoint video, without mesh proxy, pose-dependent correction, or category template. On synthetic subjects, RigPAPR matches the strongest baseline at the supervised view and exceeds mesh-based and Gaussian-splatting baselines at novel views by 3+dB PSNR, with cleaner joint-boundary renderings of both synthetic and real subjects.

interest_filter.reason: 该论文涉及Gaussian Splatting（神经点云/高斯溅射）、3D动画（骨骼绑定驱动）、以及从静态重建到动态驱动的流程，与用户的Gaussian Splatting、3D Reconstruction、4D Dynamic Reconstruction、Graphics等兴趣点直接相关。

AI.tldr: 提出RigPAPR方法，通过无需逐基元形状的PAPR表示，对静态神经点云进行自动绑定蒙皮，仅用单视角固定视点视频即可驱动，消除了关节边界伪影。
AI.motivation: 现有基于高斯泼溅或网格代理的方法在关节运动时会产生边界间隙和尖刺伪影，根源在于每个基元在标准姿态下携带了与邻居拼贴的独立形状，刚性LBS下无法弯曲导致拼贴破坏。
AI.method: 采用PAPR（邻近注意力点渲染）表示，不携带逐基元形状，而是在渲染时根据变形后的基元位置重新合成每个像素；配合自动绑定和直接LBS驱动。
AI.result: 在合成数据上，监督视角匹配最强基线，在新视角下PSNR比基于网格和高斯泼溅的基线高出3+dB，合成和真实数据的关节边界渲染更干净。
AI.conclusion: RigPAPR无需网格代理、姿态相关修正或类别模板，仅用单视角视频即可实现高质量的三维动画和可重姿态资产恢复。

title: S23DR 2026 Winning Solution
summary: This text presents the winning solution to the S23DR 2026 challenge for structured 3D wireframe reconstruction from sparse SfM, fitted depth, and semantic segmentations. The method treats vertices as a conditional set and denoises 64 vertex tokens with a flow-matching DiT conditioned on Perceiver-style scene tokens. A global pass predicts the coarse structure, a hull-cropped second pass refines it, and a small multi-sample consensus step keeps the stochastic sampler well behaved. The final system ranked first on the private leaderboard, achievingHSS = 0.654.

interest_filter.reason: 该论文涉及从稀疏SfM和深度信息中进行结构化3D线框重建，属于3D重建的子领域，与用户感兴趣的"3D Reconstruction"和"Geometric"高度相关。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个基于流匹配DiT和Perceiver场景令牌的3D线框重建方法，在S23DR 2026挑战赛中取得第一名（HSS=0.654）。该方法将顶点视为条件集进行去噪，通过全局粗预测、船体裁剪精化和小样本共识步骤实现结构化重建。
AI.motivation: 解决从稀疏SfM、拟合深度和语义分割中重建结构化3D线框的挑战，提升重建精度和鲁棒性。
AI.method: 将顶点视为条件集，使用流匹配DiT（扩散变换器）对64个顶点令牌进行去噪，并以Perceiver风格的场景令牌为条件。包含全局粗预测、船体裁剪二次精化和小样本多共识步骤。
AI.result: 在S23DR 2026挑战赛私有排行榜上排名第一，HSS指标达到0.654。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的流匹配DiT结合Perceiver条件机制的方法在3D线框重建任务上表现优异，验证了条件集去噪和两阶段精化策略的有效性。

title: 3DMorph: Single-Image-Guided Local 3D Shape Editing and Morphing
summary: Despite recent progress in 3D generation, intuitive editing of existing shapes remains limited. Unlike images, which benefit from well-established inpainting tools, general 3D objects such as meshes still lack simple and effective methods for local shape editing. Existing approaches are often global, domain-specific, require complex user interaction, or focus on appearance (color and texture) rather than geometry. We introduce 3DMorph, a training-free framework for single-image-guided local 3D shape editing and morphing. Given an edited image showing a desired shape modification, our method automatically localizes the relevant 3D region and transfers 2D modifications to 3D while preserving unmodified areas. 3DMorph also enables intermediate shape generation between the original and edited objects, facilitating design exploration. To benchmark editing quality, we introduce Delta3D, an image-guided local 3D editing benchmark with paired ground-truth edits. Experimental results show that 3DMorph translates intuitive 2D edits into 3D, outperforming state-of-the-art generative and editing methods.

interest_filter.reason: 该论文提出了一种基于单张图像引导的局部3D形状编辑与变形方法（3DMorph），涉及3D生成、几何编辑、形状变形等主题，与用户关注的"3D Generation"、"Geometric"、"Graphics"等方向紧密相关。虽然论文不是直接做视频生成或高斯泼溅，但属于3D几何编辑这一核心研究方向，对下游3D内容创作有重要意义。

AI.tldr: 提出3DMorph框架，实现无需训练、单图引导的局部3D形状编辑与形变，并构建了Delta3D基准数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有3D形状编辑方法存在全局性、领域特定、交互复杂或仅关注外观而非几何等问题，缺乏简单有效的局部几何编辑方法。
AI.method: 3DMorph：给定编辑后的2D图像，自动定位相关3D区域，将2D修改迁移到3D，同时保持未修改区域不变，支持中间形状生成。
AI.result: 在Delta3D基准上，3DMorph在图像引导的局部3D编辑任务中优于现有最先进的生成与编辑方法。
AI.conclusion: 3DMorph能够将直观的2D编辑有效转化为3D局部形状修改，为无训练、单图引导的3D编辑提供了可行方案。

title: ExMesh: EXplicit Mesh Reconstruction with Topology Adaptation
comment: Accepted at the IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition 2026 (CVPR 2026)
summary: Reconstructing surface meshes from multi-view images has remained a core challenge in recent years. Most existing methods, whether implicit or explicit, depend on intermediate representations and post-processing steps like Marching Cubes or TSDF fusion, often resulting in artifacts and fragmented geometry. Directly optimizing explicit meshes is a promising approach. However, it presents two critical challenges. The first is how to adaptively refine mesh topology to capture detail without introducing degenerate faces. The second is how to maintain consistent UV coordinates for high-fidelity texturing as the mesh structure evolves. To overcome these, we propose ExMesh, a novel framework that directly optimizes explicit meshes by integrating differentiable optimization with discrete topology updates. Specifically, we introduce an adaptive vertex splitting and merging strategy, along with real-time UV maintenance, to enable coarse-to-fine optimization while preserving geometric integrity. To our knowledge, ExMesh is the first framework to seamlessly integrate discrete topology operations into a continuous differentiable optimization pipeline. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ExMesh achieves a balance among accuracy, computational efficiency, and mesh conciseness.

interest_filter.reason: 该论文提出ExMesh框架，直接从多视角图像优化显式网格，涉及网格拓扑自适应优化、UV坐标保持等几何处理技术，与用户的"3D Reconstruction"（三维重建）和"Geometric"（几何）兴趣点高度匹配。同时涉及显式网格表示与优化，属于3D重建领域的核心子问题。

AI.tldr: ExMesh提出了一种直接优化显式网格的新框架，通过将可微优化与离散拓扑更新相结合，实现了从粗到细的网格重建，无需中间表示和后处理步骤。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖中间表示（如Marching Cubes或TSDF融合）会产生伪影和不连续的几何结构，而直接优化显式网格虽具潜力但面临两大挑战：如何自适应细化网格拓扑而不产生退化面，以及如何在网格结构演化时保持一致的UV坐标用于高质量纹理映射。
AI.method: 提出ExMesh框架，核心包括：1) 自适应的顶点分裂与合并策略，实现粗到细的优化；2) 实时UV维护机制，确保纹理映射一致性；3) 将离散拓扑操作无缝集成到连续可微优化管线中。
AI.result: 实验表明ExMesh在精度、计算效率和网格简洁性之间达到了良好的平衡。
AI.conclusion: ExMesh是首个将离散拓扑操作无缝集成到连续可微优化管线中的框架，为直接优化显式网格进行多视图表面重建提供了有效方案。

title: Beyond Skeletons: Learning Animation Directly from Driving Videos with Same2X Training Strategy
summary: Human image animation aims to generate a video from a static reference image, guided by pose information extracted from a driving video. Existing approaches often rely on pose estimators to extract intermediate representations, but such signals are prone to errors under occlusion or complex poses. Building on these observations, we present DirectAnimator, a framework that bypasses pose extraction and directly learns from raw driving videos. We introduce a Driving Cue Triplet consisting of pose, face, and location cues that captures motion, expression, and alignment in a semantically rich yet stable form, and we fuse them through a CueFusion DiT block for reliable control during denoising. To make learning dependable when the driving and reference identities differ, we devise a Same2X training strategy that aligns cross-ID features with those learned from same-ID data, regularizing optimization and accelerating convergence. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DirectAnimator attains state-of-the-art visual quality and identity preservation while remaining robust to occlusions and complex articulation, and it does so with fewer computational resources. Our project page is at https://directanimator.github.io/.

interest_filter.reason: 该论文涉及视频生成（human image animation）、人体动画和姿态驱动视频生成，与用户兴趣中的"Video Generation"和"Interactive Video Generation"直接相关。虽然更侧重2D人体动画，但属于视频生成的重要子领域。

AI.tldr: DirectAnimator提出了一种无需姿态提取的人体图像动画框架，通过驾驶线索三元组（姿态、面部、位置）和CueFusion DiT模块实现鲁棒控制，并采用Same2X训练策略处理跨身份数据，在减少计算资源的同时达到SOTA效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖姿态估计器提取中间表示，但在遮挡或复杂姿态下容易出错，因此需要一种更鲁棒、无需显式姿态提取的人体动画生成方法。
AI.method: 提出DirectAnimator框架，包含：(1) Driving Cue Triplet（姿态、面部、位置线索）直接提取运动、表情和对齐信息；(2) CueFusion DiT模块融合上述线索进行去噪控制；(3) Same2X训练策略对齐跨身份与同身份特征，加速收敛并提升泛化能力。
AI.result: 在视觉质量和身份保持上达到SOTA，对遮挡和复杂关节运动具有鲁棒性，且计算资源消耗更低。
AI.conclusion: DirectAnimator通过绕过姿态提取、引入语义丰富的驾驶线索三元组和跨身份训练策略，实现了高效、鲁棒的人体图像动画生成。

title: GuideCAD: A Lightweight Multimodal Framework for 3D CAD Model Generation via Prefix Embedding
summary: Multi-modal approaches used for 3D CAD generation require substantial computational resources, necessitating efficient training. To address this, we propose GuideCAD, which leverages semantically rich visual-textual representations having only a small number of trainable parameters to generate 3D CAD models. Specifically, GuideCAD uses a mapping network that converts image embeddings into prefix embeddings, enabling a pretrained large language model to integrate visual and textual information. As a result, a transformer-based decoder predicts the construction sequence using the visual-textual embeddings in order to generate the 3D CAD model. For experimental evaluation, we construct a new dataset, referred to as GuideCAD, which consists of text-image pairs. Each pair includes a text prompt that represents a 3D CAD construction sequence and its corresponding 3D CAD image. Our experimental results show that GuideCAD generates comparably high-quality 3D CAD models while using approximately four times fewer parameters and achieving twice the training efficiency compared to fine-tuning approaches. We have released the source code and dataset for our method at: https://github.com/mskimS2/GuideCAD

interest_filter.reason: 该论文研究3D CAD模型的生成，属于3D生成（3D Generation）范畴。虽然具体应用是CAD模型而非通用3D内容，但方法涉及多模态表示、大语言模型与Transformer解码器生成3D序列，与3D生成这一用户兴趣方向明确相关。

AI.tldr: GuideCAD提出了一种高效的3D CAD生成方法，通过视觉-文本表示和少量可训练参数，实现了比微调方法快2倍的训练效率和少4倍的参数，同时生成质量相当。
AI.motivation: 多模态3D CAD生成方法需要大量计算资源，训练效率低下，亟需更高效的训练方案。
AI.method: 利用映射网络将图像嵌入转换为前缀嵌入，使预训练大语言模型融合视觉和文本信息，再由基于Transformer的解码器预测构建序列以生成3D CAD模型。
AI.result: 相比微调方法，GuideCAD使用约4倍少的参数，训练效率提升2倍，同时生成质量相当的高质量3D CAD模型。
AI.conclusion: GuideCAD通过视觉-文本表示和小参数量设计，在保证生成质量的前提下显著提升了3D CAD生成的训练效率。

title: Dash2Sim: Closed-Loop Driving Simulation from in-the-wild Dashcam Videos
summary: Self-driving simulations typically rely on data collected in a small number of cities or on hand-authored synthetic scenarios. Dashcam videos cover a far broader range of locations and situations, including rare or long-tailed scenarios. They are considered less usable for simulation because it is difficult to recover accurate 4D scenes from monocular in-the-wild videos. Work zones are one such class of long-tailed situations that dashcams capture. We present Dash2Sim, a framework that turns in-the-wild monocular dashcam videos into metric, geo-referenced 4D driving logs compatible with existing simulators, and verifies eachone against an independently maintained map without annotations. We apply Dash2Sim to a large video corpus to create the ROADWork4D benchmark dataset, which spans 4,244 scenes with 2.7M 3D objects across 17 cities. On a verified subset ROADWork4D-CL (2,201 scenes), we study privileged closed-loop planners and find that work zone scenarios are difficult: while rule-based and hybrid planners generalize better than learning-based ones, all fall short, failing to make the lane changes that temporary work zone channels require. Beyond planning, dense depth recovered by Dash2Sim improves novel-view synthesis quality by up to 19% on perceptual metrics, suggesting its potential to provide rich conditioning for closed-loop sensor simulation from monocular videos.

interest_filter.reason: 该论文提出了Dash2Sim框架，将单目行车记录仪视频转化为度量级、地理参考的4D驾驶日志，用于闭环驾驶仿真。论文涉及4D动态重建（4D Dynamic Reconstruction）、3D重建（3D Reconstruction）、几何（Geometric）等内容，并且重建的场景可直接用于仿真和传感器模拟，与用户的多个研究兴趣直接相关。

AI.tldr: Dash2Sim是一个将单目行车记录仪视频转化为4D驾驶模拟数据的框架，创建了覆盖17个城市4244个场景的ROADWork4D基准数据集，并揭示了现有规划器在施工区场景中的不足。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶仿真通常依赖少数城市的数据或手工合成的场景，而行车记录仪视频覆盖更广泛的场景（包括长尾场景如施工区），但难以从中恢复精确的4D场景信息，因此需要一种方法将这些视频转化为可用的仿真数据。
AI.method: 提出Dash2Sim框架，将单目行车记录仪视频转化为度量级、地理参考的4D驾驶日志，并与独立维护的地图进行验证。基于此构建ROADWork4D基准数据集，包含4244个场景和270万个3D对象。
AI.result: 在ROADWork4D-CL验证子集（2201个场景）上，基于规则和混合的规划器比学习型泛化更好，但所有规划器在施工区场景中均表现不佳，无法完成临时施工通道所需的变道操作。Dash2Sim恢复的密集深度在新视角合成质量上提升高达19%。
AI.conclusion: 施工区场景对现有规划器具有挑战性，Dash2Sim从单目视频中提取的4D数据不仅可用于规划评估，还能为闭环传感器仿真提供丰富的条件信息。

title: Native3D: End-to-End 3D Scene Generation via Unified Mesh-Texture Modeling and Semantic Alignment
summary: This paper presents Native3D, the first end-to-end 3D scene generation framework that completely bypasses 2D intermediate representations. Traditional approaches typically require adapting 3D representations to the 2D domain to leverage pre-trained diffusion models, which inevitably introduces domain adaptation issues including geometric structural distortion and texture detail degradation. To address these limitations, we design a unified mesh-texture joint representation that simultaneously models both geometric structures and texture features through a Transformer-based scene encoder, effectively maintaining spatial relationships and visual consistency among objects within scenes. We further propose the 3D Representation Alignment Loss (3D REPA Loss), which employs an improved contrastive learning mechanism to align multi-level semantic representations in the latent space, significantly enhancing geometric and textural fidelity. Experimental results demonstrate that Native3D outperforms existing methods in both generation quality and editing flexibility, providing a novel solution for 3D scene editing.

interest_filter.reason: 该论文提出了首个端到端3D场景生成框架Native3D，聚焦于3D场景的几何结构和纹理建模，直接涉及用户的"3D Generation"、"3D Reconstruction"、"Geometric"等研究兴趣。虽然论文主要关注3D场景生成而非视频或动态重建，但其核心主题与用户兴趣高度匹配。

AI.tldr: Native3D是首个完全绕过2D中间表示的端到端3D场景生成框架，通过统一的网格-纹理联合表示和3D REPA损失函数，解决了传统方法中的域适应问题，在生成质量和编辑灵活性上均优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 传统3D场景生成方法需要将3D表示适配到2D领域以利用预训练的扩散模型，这不可避免地引入域适应问题，包括几何结构失真和纹理细节退化。本文旨在解决这一根本性局限。
AI.method: 1) 设计统一的网格-纹理联合表示，通过基于Transformer的场景编码器同时建模几何结构和纹理特征，保持场景内物体的空间关系和视觉一致性。2) 提出3D表示对齐损失(3D REPA Loss)，采用改进的对比学习机制在潜在空间中对齐多层级语义表示，增强几何和纹理保真度。
AI.result: Native3D在生成质量和编辑灵活性上均优于现有方法，为3D场景编辑提供了一种新的解决方案。
AI.conclusion: Native3D通过端到端的3D场景生成框架有效解决了域适应问题，为3D场景生成和编辑领域提供了全新的技术路径。

title: EvoGS: Constructing Continuous-Layered Gaussian Splatting with Evolution Tree for Scalable 3D Streaming
summary: Streaming 3D Gaussian Splatting requires highly scalable, progressive representations. Existing progressive methods rely on \textit{discrete layering}, accumulating separate splat sets for each level of detail. This structural independence between layers inherently leads to error accumulation, severe splat redundancy, and uncontrolled quality transitions. We propose EvoGS, the first \textit{continuous-layering} representation. Organized as an Evolution Tree, EvoGS generates finer details via an explicit, wavelet-inspired parent-child refinement. This empowers child nodes to structurally correct ancestral errors, yield inherently sparse and highly compressible inter-layer signals. Extensive experiments show EvoGS eliminates splat redundancy from over 65\% to under 25\%. Compared to state-of-the-art baselines, it reduces transmission payload and GPU VRAM footprint by up to 2.4$\times$ and 5.5$\times$, respectively, and achieves smooth quality transitions optimal for real-time adaptive streaming. Project page: https://yuang-ian.github.io/evogs/

interest_filter.reason: 该论文提出基于演化树的连续分层高斯泼溅方法（EvoGS），直接涉及"Gaussian Splatting"和"3D Streaming"，属于用户兴趣" Gaussian Splatting"和"3D Generation/Reconstruction"的紧密相关子课题。

AI.tldr: EvoGS是首个连续分层的高斯泼溅流式表示方法，通过进化树结构实现父-子节点小波启发式细化，将冗余率从65%降至25%以下，传输负载和显存占用分别降低2.4倍和5.5倍，支持实时自适应流式传输。
AI.motivation: 现有流式3D高斯泼溅方法依赖离散分层结构，各层独立累积高斯泼溅集，导致误差累积、严重冗余和过渡质量不可控。EvoGS旨在解决这些问题，实现连续分层表示。
AI.method: 提出进化树（Evolution Tree）结构，通过小波启发的父-子节点细化机制生成更精细细节，子节点能够结构性地修正祖先误差，产生固有稀疏且高度可压缩的层间信号。
AI.result: 将高斯冗余率从超过65%降至25%以下；传输负载降低2.4倍，GPU显存占用降低5.5倍；实现平滑质量过渡，适合实时自适应流式传输。
AI.conclusion: EvoGS通过连续分层表示有效消除了离散分层方法的冗余和误差累积问题，在压缩效率和流式传输质量上均达到最优。

title: AnchorWorld: Embodied Egocentric World Simulation with View-based Evolution Customization
summary: Despite being a pivotal frontier, interactive world modeling remains underexplored in terms of the versatile controllability required by practical scenarios. To bridge this gap, we present AnchorWorld, a framework that advances egocentric simulation through enhanced interaction integrity and a flexible mechanism for world customization. First, we utilize 3D human motion as the primary interaction modality. To complement the out-of-view or truncated body parts in egocentric views, we introduce an auxiliary training supervision that incorporates exogenous viewpoints decoupled from the agent's first-person sensorium. It allows the model to observe the agent's full-body positioning relative to the environment, facilitating a more robust spatial grounding of human-world interactions. Furthermore, we propose a simple yet effective mechanism for customizing self-evolving worlds. This is achieved by defining anchor views within a unified world coordinate system, coupled with textual descriptions dictating the dynamic evolution of local scenes. Experimental results show that AnchorWorld significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, while ablation studies validate the effectiveness of our key designs. Notably, our customization scheme exhibits promising spatio-temporal geometric consistency and adheres strictly to the prescribed evolutionary dynamics.

interest_filter.reason: 该论文提出AnchorWorld框架，专注于具身第一人称视角的世界模拟与交互，涉及3D人体运动、空间几何一致性和动态场景演化。明确匹配"World Model"（世界模型）、"Interactive Video Generation"（交互式视频生成）、"Geometric"（几何一致性）、"3D Reconstruction"（3D重建/空间定位）等用户兴趣，且与"Video Generation"和"4D Dynamic Reconstruction"高度相关。

AI.tldr: AnchorWorld提出了一个基于3D人体运动和辅助视角监督的交互式世界建模框架，支持通过锚定视图和文本描述自定义自演化世界，显著优于现有基线。
AI.motivation: 交互式世界建模在实际场景中需要的多功能可控性尚未得到充分探索。
AI.method: 1) 以3D人体运动为主要交互模态；2) 引入外源性视角辅助训练监督，弥补自我中心视图下身体部位的缺失；3) 通过定义统一世界坐标系中的锚定视图及文本描述，实现自演化世界的定制。
AI.result: AnchorWorld显著优于最先进的基线方法，消融实验验证了关键设计的有效性，定制方案展现出良好的时空几何一致性并严格遵循演化动态。
AI.conclusion: AnchorWorld通过增强交互完整性和灵活的世界定制机制，推进了自我中心仿真领域的发展。

title: Streaming Video Generation with Streaming Force Control
summary: We introduce StreamForce, a streaming video generation framework that enables physically grounded control through continuous force inputs. Unlike prior video models that train separate models for different force types, assume fixed forces, or rely on non-causal processing, StreamForce is a causal and unified model that responds instantly and coherently to both local and global, time-varying forces. To achieve this, we design a unified force representation as a control signal and develop a distillation pipeline for force-controllable video generation. Our model combines autoregressive efficiency with force responsiveness, sustaining stable photometric and dynamic realism. StreamForce runs at up to 16.6 FPS on a single GPU, achieving state-of-the-art performance in both force adherence and motion realism. Project website: https://neu-vi.github.io/StreamForce/

interest_filter.reason: 该论文研究流式视频生成中的力控制，涉及物理动画（Physical Animation）、视频生成（Video Generation）和物理仿真等用户感兴趣的主题。虽然"流体模拟"（Fluid Simulation）不是其直接重点，但物理力控制和动态真实感与用户的物理动画、视频生成等兴趣高度相关。

AI.tldr: StreamForce是一个流式视频生成框架，通过统一的力表示和蒸馏流程，实现因果、实时且物理可控的视频生成，在单GPU上达到16.6 FPS，兼顾力控制精度与运动真实性。
AI.motivation: 现有视频模型针对不同力类型需单独训练、假设力为固定值或依赖非因果处理，缺乏统一且实时的物理力控制能力。
AI.method: 设计统一力表示作为控制信号，构建蒸馏流程实现力可控视频生成；采用因果自回归架构，兼顾效率与力响应能力。
AI.result: 单GPU上运行速度达16.6 FPS，在力控制遵循度和运动真实感方面达到最优性能。
AI.conclusion: StreamForce通过统一因果框架有效解决了视频生成中物理力控制的实时性与一致性挑战。

title: UniSHARP: Universal Sharp Monocular View Synthesis
summary: In this work, we focus on extending SHARP, the popular photorealistic view synthesis method, for universal monocular rendering across a continuum of camera systems, from conventional perspective cameras to wide-field-of-view, fisheye and omnidirectional panoramic settings. To overcome the pinhole-specific assumptions of SHARP, our key idea is to align various images in a unified omnidirectional latent space. Thus, we propose UniSHARP, which performs implicit alignment in both feature and Gaussian spaces. Specifically, Gaussian primitives are arranged along rays and radial distances in a ray-based universal representation, while 2D semantic and 3D spatial features extracted from UniK3D-inspired encoders are jointly decoded to generate the complete Gaussian cloud. To comprehensively evaluate our method, we construct a benchmark covering diverse imaging systems across various scenes. The benchmark is further stratified by field of view (FoV) to enable fine-grained assessment of the universal monocular rendering task. Extensive experiments on the proposed benchmark demonstrate the effectiveness of UniSHARP, outperforming alternative methods by a large margin. The project page can be found at: https://insta360-research-team.github.io/Unisharp-website/

interest_filter.reason: 该论文涉及基于高斯溅射（Gaussian Splatting）的视图合成方法UniSHARP，直接关联到用户兴趣中的"Gaussian Splatting"和"3D Reconstruction"。虽然论文重点在单目视图合成，但其核心使用3D高斯原语表示场景并重建，属于高斯溅射的延伸应用。

AI.tldr: UniSHARP 将 SHARP 方法从针孔相机扩展到全景、鱼眼等通用相机系统，通过在统一的球面隐空间中对齐特征和高斯体实现单目渲染，在构建的多相机基准上大幅超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: SHARP 方法受限于针孔相机假设，无法适用于鱼眼、全景等广视角相机系统。作者希望突破这一限制，实现跨多种相机系统的通用单目渲染。
AI.method: 统一球面隐空间对齐：在特征空间和高斯体空间中进行隐式对齐；基于射线的通用表示：高斯基元沿射线和径向距离排列；联合解码：从 UniK3D 启发的编码器中提取 2D 语义和 3D 空间特征，共同解码生成完整高斯云。
AI.result: 构建了覆盖多种成像系统并按视场角分层评估的基准；实验表明 UniSHARP 大幅优于对比方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: UniSHARP 成功将 SHARP 扩展为通用单目渲染方法，突破针孔相机限制，为多相机系统提供了高效的光照合成方案。
